calendar.matters:
Petitioner'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Mar-30-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ELIZABETH C. PRITZKER, ESQ. of Pritzker Levine, Tel No. 415-692-0772 appearing for the Petitioner;
Deputy City Attorney CHRISTINE VAN AKEN of the City and County of San Francisco Office of the City Attorney, Tel No. 415-554-4633 appearing for the Respondent The Airport Commission of the City and County of San Francisco.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Petitioner A.J. Califonria Mini Bus' writ of mandate petition is denied. Petitioner acknowledges that it never requested the two documents that are the subject of its writ. Respondent Airport Commission provided substantial evidence that the documents were available for public inspection at its office prior to the January 19 meeting and at that meeting. Respondent had no obligation to post the documents on its website or display them at the meeting. Moreover, petitioner cannot seek relief under Government Code section 54960.1 for an alleged violation of Government Code section 54957.5. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
